courtName: Wood County Court of Common Pleas
clerkAddress: Wood County Clerk of Courts, 1 Courthouse Sq, Bowling Green, OH 43402
requiredDocuments: Application for Sealing of a Record of Conviction (R.C. 2953.32)
Case list attachment (if filing for more than one case)
steps: Review your court-ready packet for accuracy and signatures before filing.
Make at least two copies: one for your records and one for service if requested by the clerk.
File the original packet with the Wood County Clerk of Courts in person or by mail.
Pay the filing fee/deposit required by the clerk at filing.
Keep stamped copies and monitor mail/email for hearing or court notices.
notes: Bring government-issued photo ID for in-person filing.
If mailing, use trackable delivery and include a self-addressed stamped envelope if the clerk requests it.
Verify filing requirements with the clerk before submitting.

courtName: Franklin County Court of Common Pleas
clerkAddress: Franklin County Clerk of Courts, 345 S High St, Columbus, OH 43215
requiredDocuments: Application to Seal Record of Conviction
Proposed order (if required by assigned judge)
steps: Confirm whether your assigned courtroom requires additional proposed orders or cover sheets.
Submit your court-ready packet through approved e-filing or at the clerk counter.
Pay the filing fee/deposit during submission.
Save confirmation receipts and transaction numbers.
Watch for hearing notices and court updates from the clerk.
notes: E-filing account registration may be required before submission.
Document upload size/format limits can vary by filing portal.
Verify filing requirements with the clerk before submitting.
